title: crotalaria atrorubens
intro: Crotalaria atrorubens, also known as the red-flowered rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria atrorubens include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria atrorubens can be made from its leaves, seeds, or roots, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
